---
title: "Contact"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0f172a 0%,#162032 100%); padding:3.5rem 2rem 3rem;">
  <div style="max-width:900px; margin:0 auto;">
    <div class="hero-eyebrow" style="margin-bottom:1rem;">Let's Connect</div>
    <h1 style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-size:clamp(1.8rem,4vw,2.8rem); font-weight:800; color:#f1f5f9; margin:0 0 .75rem; letter-spacing:-.03em;">Get In Touch</h1>
    <p style="color:#94a3b8; font-size:1.05rem; margin:0; max-width:520px; line-height:1.65;">
      Open to new opportunities, collaborations, and conversations about data, analytics, and technology.
    </p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="section" style="max-width:820px;">

  <h2 class="section-title">Contact Details</h2>

  <div class="contact-grid">

    <div class="contact-card">
      <div class="contact-icon">📧</div>
      <div>
        <div class="contact-label">Email</div>
        <div class="contact-value">
          <a href="mailto:bakdauletkarakulov@gmail.com">bakdauletkarakulov@gmail.com</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="contact-card">
      <div class="contact-icon">🔗</div>
      <div>
        <div class="contact-label">LinkedIn</div>
        <div class="contact-value">
          <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/bakdault/" target="_blank">linkedin.com/in/bakdault</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="contact-card">
      <div class="contact-icon">📍</div>
      <div>
        <div class="contact-label">Location</div>
        <div class="contact-value">Greater Boston, MA</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="contact-card">
      <div class="contact-icon">🎓</div>
      <div>
        <div class="contact-label">Current Status</div>
        <div class="contact-value">M.S. Student · Boston University</div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>

  <!-- Open to section -->
  <div style="background:#f1f5f9; border-radius:var(--radius); padding:2rem; margin-bottom:2.5rem;">
    <h3 style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-size:1.1rem; font-weight:800; color:#0f172a; margin:0 0 1.25rem;">What I'm Open To</h3>
    <div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill, minmax(200px,1fr)); gap:1rem;">
      <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:.6rem; font-size:.9rem; color:#334155;">
        <span style="color:#0ea5e9; font-size:1.1rem;">✓</span> Full-time Roles
      </div>
      <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:.6rem; font-size:.9rem; color:#334155;">
        <span style="color:#0ea5e9; font-size:1.1rem;">✓</span> Consulting Projects
      </div>
      <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:.6rem; font-size:.9rem; color:#334155;">
        <span style="color:#0ea5e9; font-size:1.1rem;">✓</span> BI / Analytics Work
      </div>
      <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:.6rem; font-size:.9rem; color:#334155;">
        <span style="color:#0ea5e9; font-size:1.1rem;">✓</span> Research Collaborations
      </div>
      <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:.6rem; font-size:.9rem; color:#334155;">
        <span style="color:#0ea5e9; font-size:1.1rem;">✓</span> Speaking / Teaching
      </div>
      <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:.6rem; font-size:.9rem; color:#334155;">
        <span style="color:#0ea5e9; font-size:1.1rem;">✓</span> Networking
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- CTA -->
  <div style="text-align:center; padding:2rem; border:2px dashed #e2e8f0; border-radius:var(--radius);">
    <div style="font-size:2rem; margin-bottom:.75rem;">👋</div>
    <h3 style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-weight:800; color:#0f172a; margin:0 0 .5rem;">Let's work together</h3>
    <p style="color:#64748b; margin:0 0 1.5rem; font-size:.95rem;">
      The best way to reach me is via email or LinkedIn. I typically respond within 24 hours.
    </p>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:1rem; justify-content:center; flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <a href="mailto:bakdauletkarakulov@gmail.com" class="btn-primary-custom">Send an Email</a>
      <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/bakdault/" target="_blank" class="btn-outline-custom" style="color:#0f172a; border-color:#cbd5e1;">Connect on LinkedIn</a>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```
